coverage_by_requirement.title: Secure development lifecycle
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Lifecycle exit and retirement criteria require explicit treatment.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Risk-based applicability
coverage_by_requirement.gap: A machine-readable applicability decision is not yet defined.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Roles and competence
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Competence and reviewer independence are not consistently evidenced.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Controlled security documentation
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Required document content and currency are not evaluated uniformly.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Asset and threat identification
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Runtime evidence does not require a structured asset and risk register.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Threat modeling
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Threat-model currency and review evidence are not machine-validated.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Risk treatment and reassessment
coverage_by_requirement.gap: A structured risk-treatment evidence contract is missing.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Security architecture review
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Detailed review outcomes are not consistently captured as typed evidence.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Authentication and authorization
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Application-level verification is not part of the current DevSecOps baseline.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Session security
coverage_by_requirement.gap: No explicit session-security requirement exists.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Data and cryptographic protection
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Detailed data-protection verification is not represented in the current baseline.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Input validation and business logic
coverage_by_requirement.gap: No atomic validation and business-logic requirement exists.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Secure file handling
coverage_by_requirement.gap: No atomic secure file-handling requirement exists.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Application logging and error handling
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Application error behavior and log protection are not fully evaluated.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Secure defaults and hardening
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Product-level default-setting verification is missing.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Secure coding practices
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Language-specific applicability and training evidence are not defined.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Code and implementation review
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Review scope and independence are not consistently evidenced.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Secure development environments
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Periodic cryptographic integrity verification is not defined.

coverage_by_requirement.title: External component and supplier assurance
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Supplier assurance and contractual verification are not explicit.

coverage_by_requirement.title: SBOM component identity and relationships
coverage_by_requirement.gap: SBOM presence is checked but detailed component fields are not.

coverage_by_requirement.title: SBOM integrity and source metadata
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Component-level digest and source metadata are not validated.

coverage_by_requirement.title: SBOM license metadata
coverage_by_requirement.gap: License metadata is not part of the current SBOM evidence contract.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Component license compliance
coverage_by_requirement.gap: No component-license control or evidence type exists.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Test strategy and acceptance
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Test planning and acceptance artifacts are not standardized.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Functional, non-functional, and regression testing
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Test-category evidence and minimum expectations are not defined.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Security requirements verification
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Security test evidence is not typed at requirement level.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Penetration testing
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Scope, frequency, independence, and evidence are not defined.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Independent and protected testing
coverage_by_requirement.gap: No unified testing-independence and test-data requirement exists.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Vulnerability triage and remediation
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Remediation timelines and closure evidence are not modeled.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Security update management
coverage_by_requirement.gap: No complete security-update lifecycle control exists.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Security monitoring and alerting
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Log protection, retention, and alert-response evidence are incomplete.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Deployment and configuration verification
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Deployment verification evidence is not standardized.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Secure operation guidance
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Required secure-operation content is not defined.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Secure decommissioning and disposal
coverage_by_requirement.gap: No end-to-end decommissioning requirement exists.

coverage_by_requirement.title: Product security response and health review
coverage_by_requirement.gap: Product security response is not represented as a complete governed capability.
